content.full_text:
April 26, 2006

Margaret Roberts, City Clerk
Office of the City Clerk
City of Davis
23 Russell Boulevard
Davis, CA 95616

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-068

Dear Ms. Roberts:

This letter is to notify you that, at your request, we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Adrianne Korchmaros
Political Reform Consultant II
